@@A. The trace exhibits several issues, including disobeying task specifications (agents providing incomplete code or simplified implementations instead of the requested functionality), weak verification (failing to identify errors in generated code), step repetition (repeatedly stating the same thought or providing the same information), action-reasoning mismatches (proposing solutions that don't align with the identified problem), information withholding (not sharing relevant details), task derailment (focusing on simplified implementations instead of the core task), ignoring other agent's suggestions (continuing despite requests for clarification), premature termination (stopping tasks before completion), and loss of conversation history (restarting discussions). There are also instances of agents ignoring each other's input and failing to adhere to role specifications.
